description: Worked on mission-critical financial systems by developing data processing, reconciliation, and backend automation tools for banking transaction platforms (SLIPS, CEFT, Lanka Clear). Built high-performance Python modules for large-scale data ingestion, designed reconciliation engines to detect transaction mismatches, and implemented logging, validation, and failover mechanisms to ensure data integrity. Also contributed to maintaining and enhancing a .NET Core MVC web application by integrating MSSQL and Oracle queries, adding new features, and improving system reliability.
